bug.description: missing range validation on configuration parameter allowing out-of-spec values

prompt:
There is a missing range validation on configuration parameter allowing out-of-spec values downstream of function nr_pdcp_manager_unlock in the openair2/LAYER2/nr_pdcp subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/nr_pdcp/nr_pdcp_ue_manager.c:75.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
